tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
chmod 700 /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /bin/tar /usr/bin/find && ls -l /usr//bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /bin/tar /usr/bin/find /usr/bin/ping
-rwx------ 1 root root 432048 Apr  8  2024 /bin/tar
-rwx------ 1 root root 297288 Dec 11  2024 /usr/bin/curl
-rwx------ 1 root root 204264 Apr  8  2024 /usr/bin/find
-rwxr-xr-- 1 root root  89800 Jul 24  2025 /usr/bin/ping
-rwx------ 1 root root 470032 Jun 19  2024 /usr/bin/wget
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
